name: speech_to_speech
description: Handles bidirectional speech-to-speech conversion using NVIDIA PersonaPlex for real-time conversations with persona control.

parameters.input_wav: Path to input WAV file for speech input
parameters.voice_prompt: Voice embedding file (e.g., NATF2.pt) for voice conditioning
parameters.text_prompt: Text-based persona prompt (e.g., 'You are a wise assistant.')

usage: Used in utils.py for audio processing; supports offline and server modes.
